claim_ceiling: Validates a bridge campaign fan-in DAG against a public-safe subset of the macro CR/VR rule families over bounded public fixtures (schema and identity, unique node labels, existing dependency edges, acyclicity, exactly one synthesis node reaching a probe, barrier alignment, and provider safe-parallelism) and rejects malformed campaigns by recomputation; does not dispatch agents, execute campaigns, prove provider correctness, authorize release or publication, or claim full private-root equivalence.
